items.title: Timeline column option to use a Work schedule
items.excerpt:
The Work schedule feature would do well to link to the timeline column. 
  
Easiest way would be to add an “Use Work Schedule” option in the settings

items.title: Subitem date's showing on "My Work Mobile"
items.excerpt: We use the “My Work” tool in anger, it is frustrating that on the mobile app you can’t see any works that have been assigned to you in a subitem only the main item.

items.title: Bulk updating subtasks
items.excerpt: I would really like the ability to bulk update subtasks. Right now, we can only select all of the subtasks under one main task, but we would like to be able to select all of the subtasks and make a bulk edit.

items.title: Customize info on card in Kanban view
items.excerpt:

Is it possible to customize which info that is displayed on the actual Kanban card? It would be nice to see tags, estimates, reported time… etc etc… 
/Johan

items.title: Option to select a group of projects or subitems and automatically make each one dependent on the previous one
